# lit-material

> A Material Design 3 web component collection built with Lit — one package per component, no shared
> mega-bundle, no required adapter layer, SSR-ready.

lit-material is a pnpm + Turborepo monorepo published as independently installable `@lit-material/*` npm
packages (one per component), plus a handful of app-shell primitives (router, state store, context, data
fetching, form validation) and a scaffolding CLI. Every component reads its visual design from
`@lit-material/tokens`'s CSS custom properties, is tested against both a real browser and `@lit-labs/ssr`, and
is documented with a live demo in `apps/docs`. Each package's own README is the source of truth for its API and
scope cuts — read it before assuming something is missing or unimplemented.

## Components

- [Button](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/button): Filled, outlined, text, elevated, tonal.
- [Icon Button](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/icon-button): Standard + toggle variants.
- [FAB](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/fab): Floating action button.
- [Text Field](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/text-field): Filled + outlined, validation states.
- [Checkbox](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/checkbox): Checked, indeterminate, error, form participation.
- [Radio](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/radio): Grouped selection, error, form participation.
- [Switch](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/switch): On/off toggle, optional thumb icons, form participation.
- [Slider](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/slider): Single value, native `<input type="range">`-based.
- [Select](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/select): `lit-material-select` + `lit-material-select-option`.
- [Chip](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/chip): Assist, filter, input, suggestion variants.
- [Segmented Button](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/segmented-button): Single-select or multi-select connected button row.
- [Card](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/card): Elevated, filled, outlined; optionally interactive.
- [Carousel](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/carousel): Scroll-snap based, with overlaid nav buttons.
- [List](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/list): `lit-material-list` + `lit-material-list-item`.
- [Data Table](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/data-table): Sortable, selectable, paginated, resizable, virtualized.
- [Badge](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/badge): Small dot or large numeric/text badge.
- [Divider](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/divider): Horizontal or vertical, optionally inset.
- [Tooltip](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/tooltip): Plain tooltip, built on the native Popover API.
- [Dialog](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/dialog): Built on the native `<dialog>` element.
- [Sheet](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/sheet): Side sheet and bottom sheet; same native `<dialog>` foundation.
- [Menu](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/menu): Built on the native Popover API.
- [Search](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/search): Search bar and docked search view; view built on the native Popover API.
- [Snackbar](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/snackbar): Built on the native Popover API.
- [Tabs](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/tabs): `lit-material-tabs` + `lit-material-tab`.
- [Top App Bar](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/top-app-bar): Center-aligned, small, medium, large.
- [Navigation](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/navigation): Navigation drawer, rail, and bottom bar.
- [Progress](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/progress): Linear and circular progress indicators.
- [Date Picker](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/date-picker): Modal or docked date picker and date range picker.
- [Time Picker](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/time-picker): Clock-dial dialog, 12- or 24-hour.
- [Autocomplete](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/autocomplete): Text field with a filtered, data-driven option list.
- [Accordion](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/accordion): Expansion panels, single- or multi-expand.
- [Stepper](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/stepper): Wizard-progress indicator, horizontal or vertical, linear or free.
- [Tree](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/tree): Hierarchical expand-collapse list, single- or multi-select.
- [Avatar](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/avatar): Image, initials, or icon fallback.
- [Skeleton](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/skeleton): Loading placeholder — text, circular, rectangular, rounded.
- [Rating](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/rating): Star rating, native range input foundation, hover preview.
- [Speed Dial](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/speed-dial): Expandable FAB menu, built on the Popover API.
- [Breadcrumbs](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/breadcrumbs): Nav landmark showing the current page's place in a hierarchy.

## App shell

- [Router](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/router): Path matching, an SPA route outlet, a route-reading controller.
- [Store](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/store): A dependency-free, Redux-shaped state store.
- [Core](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/core): Ripple/focus-ring controllers, `themeContext`, `localeContext`.
- [Task](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/task): A reactive controller for async work (data fetching).
- [Form](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/form): A reactive controller tracking a `<form>`'s aggregate validity.
- [create-lit-material-app](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/create-lit-material-app): `npm create lit-material-app` — a scaffolded starting point with the above wired together.
- [Tokens](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/packages/tokens): Color, type, shape, elevation, and motion design tokens every component reads from.

## Guides

- [README](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/blob/main/README.md): Why Lit/lit-material, install instructions, the full package list, and development commands.
- [Building apps guide](https://bohdaq.github.io/lit-material/guide/building-apps): Router + store + context + task + form wired together in one example.

## Optional

- [Docs site](https://bohdaq.github.io/lit-material/): Every component's live playground and API table, plus the theme builder. Source at [apps/docs](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/apps/docs); run `pnpm --filter @lit-material/docs dev` for a local copy.
- [App-shell demo](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/tree/main/apps/app-shell-demo): A small runnable app showing router/store/context together (private, unpublished).
- [License](https://github.com/bohdaq/lit-material/blob/main/LICENSE): MIT.
